Adds src/main.tsx and index.html so Vite can produce a static web build (dist/) suitable for Appflow web deployment.

- Adds src/main.tsx and index.html so Vite can produce a static web build (dist/) suitable for Appflow web deployment.
- Adds README note with Appflow build command and artifact path.
- Notes: the repo still contains server-side files (src/server.ts, src/start.ts) used for SSR — Appflow static deploy will publish the Vite build only.
